title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology explains how AI detects zero-day vulnerabilities and reshapes cybersecurity defense strategies. The segment covers AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps as approaches to identify security risks faster and improve system safety.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI is accelerating the detection of zero-day vulnerabilities and what that shift means for cybersecurity risk management. The video covers AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps as mechanisms for improving system safety. The takeaway is that faster AI-based detection changes how organizations identify and respond to exploits before they are weaponized.
